hypothesis: On the Gongora et al. lattice dataset, augmenting NeAT with inverse-propensity weighting in the MAE loss—using propensities estimated from empirical observation frequencies for each value in every design-variable mode—will increase test-set R2 by at least 5 percentage points under the biased sampling protocols of Section 3.2 while reducing uniform-sampling R2 by no more than 1 point.
